---
name: Data source ingestion
about: Add or update an external biodiversity / Earth systems source snapshot
title: "[data] "
labels: data, pipeline
---

## Source

- **Name:**
- **Category:** taxonomy / occurrence / conservation / fossil / time / biome / geography
- **Version or date:**
- **License:**
- **DOI or citation:**

## Scope

What taxa, places, or time units does this snapshot cover?

## Checklist

- [ ] Snapshot manifest includes checksum, retrieval date, `approvedForUse`
- [ ] Mock/sample data clearly flagged (`isMockData: false` only when real)
- [ ] Bundles regenerated
- [ ] `npm run audit:provenance` passes
- [ ] `npm run audit:coverage` passes
